Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses And To Produce Documents; Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $2040.00
Off Calendar Jun-21-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF ALYX PARK's Motion To Compel Responses And To Compel Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $1,020, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Response To Request For Admission No. 23;
Off Calendar May-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Joshua A. Gratch, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Alyx Park
William F. McLaughlin, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: PP & Towing & Recovery, Inc.

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff's motion to compel further response to request for admission no. 23 granted, as follows: defendant shall provide a verified supplemental response to plaintiff's request for admission no. 23; to the extent that the response is other than an unqualified admission, plaintiff may provide clarification on its response to form interrogatory 17.1. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar May-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Joshua A. Gratch, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Alyx Park
William F. McLaughlin, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: PP & Towing & Recovery, Inc.

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified. Plaintiff Alyx Park's Motion to compel response to form interrogatories granted; defendant shall serve full, complete and verified answers to plaintiff's form interrogatories within TEN days of the date of service of this order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Response To Request For Production Of Documents Nos. 9-13
Off Calendar May-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Joshua A. Gratch, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Alyx Park
William F. McLaughlin, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: PP & Towing & Recovery, Inc.

After hearing, Plaintiff's motion to compel further response to request for production of documents, nos. 9-13 is Denied without prejudice to future requests bsed on new or additional evidence, and conditioned on defendant producing copies of statements of profit and loss covering 2007 and 2008. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
